info.title: Ahrefs API
info.description: Ahrefs API v3 provides access to Site Explorer, Keywords Explorer, SERP Overview, Rank Tracker, Site Audit, Batch Analysis, and Brand Radar data. Supports backlink analysis, keyword research, organic traffic metrics, and more.

tags.name: Site Explorer
tags.description: Site Explorer endpoints for backlink and organic traffic analysis

tags.name: Keywords Explorer
tags.description: Keywords Explorer endpoints for keyword research

tags.name: Site Audit
tags.description: Site Audit endpoints for technical SEO analysis

tags.name: Rank Tracker
tags.description: Rank Tracker project management and tracking

get.description: The strength of a target's backlink profile on a 100-point logarithmic scale.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target of the search: a domain or a URL.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: A date to report metrics on in YYYY-MM-DD format.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

get.description: Total number of backlinks and referring domains.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: The target of the search: a domain or a URL.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: A date to report metrics on in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The scope of the search based on the target you entered.

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing API key

get.description: List of backlinks pointing to a target.
List of referring domains linking to a target.
Anchor text distribution of backlinks.
Pages of a target ranked by organic traffic.
All keywords a target ranks for in organic search.
Top pages of a target by organic traffic.
Domains competing with the target in organic search.
Pages with paid traffic.
All paid keywords for a target.
Broken backlinks pointing to a target.
Broken outgoing links from a target.
Overview metrics for a single keyword.
Overview metrics for multiple keywords.
Search volume history for a keyword.
Search volume by country for a keyword.
Keyword suggestions based on a seed keyword.
Keywords that the top-ranking pages also rank for.
Question-type keyword suggestions.
Top 100 SERP results for a keyword.

post.description: Metrics for up to 100 targets per request.

get.description: Returns current API usage and subscription limits.
Returns Ahrefs crawler's IP addresses and ranges.

bearerAuth.description: Ahrefs API key. Create and manage keys at https://app.ahrefs.com/account/api-keys
